scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev:backend:docker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently -k "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev:backend:docker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend:docker: cross-env USE_MONGO=true ENABLE_JOBS=true npm run dev -w backend
scripts.dev:backend:memory: cross-env USE_MONGO=false ENABLE_JOBS=false npm run dev -w backend
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env USE_MONGO=false ENABLE_JOBS=false npm run dev -w backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
